## Intensity Zone Guide (Current Training Phase)

> Derive the **pace ranges** below from:
> 1) the runner’s **last 14 days of workouts** (recent easy pace, any steady/tempo segments, and HR response), and
> 2) the **current goal phase** (base/build/peak/taper) based on the goal timeline and current fitness.
>
> If data is limited, give conservative ranges and prioritize effort/HR guidance.

| Zone | Feel | Suggested pace (derived) | Purpose |
|---|---|---|---|
| 🟢 **Easy** | Conversational, relaxed | ~__:__–__:__ | Build aerobic base |
| 🟡 **Steady** | Comfortably hard | ~__:__–__:__ | Moderate effort |
| 🟠 **Tempo** | Hard but sustainable | ~__:__–__:__ | Threshold training |
| 🔵 **Strides** | Fast bursts | 15–25s (not pace-based) | Neuromuscular work |

> 📈 **Note:** Update these ranges week to week as fitness and conditions change.

## Workout Flexibility

- **Planned workouts can be completed ±1 day** from the scheduled day
  - E.g., Tuesday workout can be done Mon, Tue, or Wed
  - This allows for schedule adjustments without disrupting the plan
  - Progress dashboard will automatically match workouts within this window

- Not tracked here; keep it consistent, avoid crushing legs before the first run of the week.
